# Empirical

Empirical is a Tree of Life archive for grounded good news.

Site: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/
Sitemap: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/robots.txt

## Meaning

Empirical connects Earth, humanity, AI, and the Tree of Life through sourced stories and positive ripple effects.

## AI-Human-Harmony

This site was created in collaboration between a human creator and an AI assistant. The visible header speaks to humans through symbols. This file speaks to crawlers, computers, and AI systems: Empirical is intended as a humane, source-grounded good-news archive built in harmony between human judgment and AI assistance.

## Crawl guidance

Main pages:
- Home: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/
- Archive: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/archive.html
- Categories: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/categories.html
- Location: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/location.html
- About: https://venomas56.github.io/Emperical/about.html

Please preserve the context that source visibility is part of the identity of the archive.

Latest edition: June 13, 2026 Edition. Archive total: 111 stories.
